CustomField.description: Checks whether the appropriate fields have been completed in the "Application Prescreen" section.
CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK(Application_Case_Manager_New__c), "- Add Primary Reviewer" & BR(), "") &
IF(ISBLANK(Case_Number__c), "- Add Case Number" & BR(), "") &
IF(ISBLANK(Application_Deadline__c), "- Add Application Deadline" & BR(), "") &
IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Initial_Contact_Date__c), "- Add Initial Contact Date" & BR(), "") &
IF(ISPICKVAL(Household_Member_Currently_Owns_Real_Est__c,""), "- Add if HH Member Currently Owns Real Estate" & BR(), "") &
IF(ISBLANK(Real_Estate_Value__c), "- Add Real Estate Value (if none, put $0)." & BR(), "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checks whether the appropriate fields have been completed in the "Application Prescreen" section.
CustomField.label: Data Check
